// freeColour.qmd  —  custom colours for xochitl pen tools
//
// Installs at /home/root/xovi/exthome/qt-resource-rebuilder/freeColour.qmd
// and is loaded by the qt-resource-rebuilder xovi extension at xochitl startup.
//
// Mechanism (cloned from upstream FouzR/xovi-extensions/3.26/changeGreenColor.qmd
// then extended): patches /qt/qml/xofm/libs/toolbar/qml/WritingTool.qml so that
// each colour-swatch delegate runs a one-shot Timer that, if its toolColor is
// one of the slots listed below, repaints itself and remaps the underlying
// PenColor enum + RGB code.
//
// The remap target is enum 9 (HIGHLIGHT). The xochitl rasterizer honours the
// per-stroke RGBA payload for HIGHLIGHTER_2 and SHADER tools (proven on-device
// by the experiments under ferrari/scratch/claude-notebook/), so for those two
// tools a custom-RGB swatch produces strokes with that exact RGB. Solid pens
// (BALLPOINT, FINELINER, …) ignore RGBA and draw whatever HIGHLIGHT enum maps
// to internally for that tool — expected to look yellow-ish on solid pens.
// This is a known limitation; v1 will scope the substitution to highlighter
// and shader only.
//
// CONFLICTS: this extension supersedes upstream changeGreenColor.qmd. Remove
// changeGreenColor.qmd before installing this — both patch the same QML file
// and they will not co-exist.

SLOT changeColorDefinitionsSlot

// Slot 10 → green. Preserves the upstream substitution so removing
// changeGreenColor.qmd does not lose any colour.
INSERT TEMPLATE changeColorDefinitionsTemplate {
    originalToolColor: 10
    newToolColor: 9
    newToolrgb: (0xFF338833)
    newDisplayColor: "#338833"
}

// Slot 5 (PINK) → brown (saddle brown #8B4513). PINK is in the
// highlighter's 6-colour palette (Yellow, Blue, Pink, Orange, Green, Gray)
// and is the slot the user is willing to sacrifice until the additive
// colour-wheel UI in v1 replaces this substitution approach with
// genuinely-new slots.
INSERT TEMPLATE changeColorDefinitionsTemplate {
    originalToolColor: 5
    newToolColor: 9
    newToolrgb: (0xFF8B4513)
    newDisplayColor: "#8B4513"
}

END SLOT

AFFECT [[6722609618937832156]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
REPLACE [[4129553690040935969]] WITH {
    function ~&4129553690040935969&~()
    {
        ~&5972376&~ (!~&254549367728975064&~.~&486403039092031347&~(~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&6504326343&~)) {
            ~&6504254477&~.~&17088436279723538867&~(~&254549367728975064&~.~&478117897681566252&~());
        }
        ~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254549367717124902&~ === 9 && !~&8399340017248501209&~.~&16051300290016870740&~(~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&214622605608&~, ~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254525455067777027&~)) {
            ~&6504254477&~.~&604284659367095156&~(~&8399340017248501209&~.~&8204156355941058436&~(), ~&8399340017248501209&~.~&6102119203847019330&~());
        }
        ~&5972376&~ (!~&8564000837190609446&~.~&9946718343130414977&~(~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254549061334391125&~)) {
            ~&6504254477&~.~&8168341223615502881&~(~&8564000837190609446&~.~&6102142810113562074&~());
        }
    }
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[254533840317782502]]
REBUILD [[254524038664609014]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
INSERT { ~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&214622605608&~ === 9 ? ~&5971598&~.~&214622605608&~("#" + ~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254525455067777027&~.~&7713616118928163&~(16)) : }
END REBUILD
REBUILD [[475535838851480711]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
INSERT { ~&16359023780737766088&~ != ~&"503220030291830651&~ ? 2 : }
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[7060683329257607547]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT {
property ~&6503679477&~ initialized: ~&214625660372&~
    ~&214604601930&~ {
        ~&7713147298280334&~: 0
        ~&233743626668842&~: ~&6504329801&~
        ~&7083121289162&~: ~&214625660372&~
        ~&495358363329399331&~: {
            ~&5972376&~ (!initialized) {

				~{changeColorDefinitionsSlot}~

                initialized = ~&6504329801&~;
            }
        }
    }
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
TEMPLATE changeColorDefinitionsTemplate {
		~&5972376&~ (~&254549367717124902&~ === ~{originalToolColor}~ ) {
			~&254549367717124902&~ = ~{newToolColor}~;
			~&197098340&~ = ~{newToolrgb}~;
			~&15784640987262621918&~ = ~{newDisplayColor}~;
		}
}
